title: brucea mollis
intro: Brucea mollis, also known as the velvet tree, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its seeds and leaves exhibiting medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brucea mollis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antitumor agent. Brucea mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be strictly regulated due to potential toxicity and side effects.
